SumOfProgramRelatedInvstGrp.Description1Txt: STUDENT LOANS AT BELOW MARKET RATES

ApplicationSubmissionInfoGrp.RestrictionsOnAwardsTxt: APPLICANT MUST BE 18 YEARS OF AGE OR OLDER AND A FULL-TIME COLLEGE OR UNIVERSITY STUDENT IN THE STATE OF TEXAS.
